description_long: This is a spacious single-story bungalow set within a fenced lot, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several dormers and chimneys, and a prominent front entrance with a covered porch. The property includes a detached garage, a driveway, and a backyard area with a garden and paved walkways. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof, and the windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern across the facades. The lot is bordered by a row of trees and hedges, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design suggests a comfortable, suburban residential setting with ample outdoor space.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard, surrounded by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees along the front fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and backyard garden area with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a clear view of the backyard and garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
